About.Name: Sedra Baian
About.AboutText:
Hi, I am Sedra Baian. I am a passionate computer science student with a keen interest in data analysis, software development, and programming. Currently, I am pursuing my undergraduate degree at Seattle Pacific University. I am dedicated to expanding my knowledge and skills in various areas of computer science, with a particular focus on Python and data-driven systems.

I enjoy tackling challenging programming projects and I thrive in collaborative environments where I can contribute my expertise and learn from my peers.

Beyond the classroom, I actively engage in building personal projects, including data analysis and visualization. I believe in the importance of continuous learning and seek out opportunities to explore new technologies and methodologies.

Experience.ExperienceText: Blending experience in sales, insurance, tech, and interpretation to bring a unique perspective to every project.
Experience.EmploymentText: As a Benefit Advisor at American Income Life, I educated clients on various insurance options and comprehensive benefit packages. My role involved helping families secure meaningful coverage tailored to their needs while fostering strong, trust‑based relationships
Experience.SkillsText: Use this to add some narrative to your skills section

Project1.Title: Amazon Review Sentiment Analysis
Project1.Desc:
A data‑driven project using Python (Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn) to analyze sentiment across thousands of Amazon reviews..

It has a GitHub repo and more details shown in screenshots.

Project2.Title: Electricity Access KPI Dashboard
Project2.Desc:
Developed a KPI dashboard to visualize electricity access trends worldwide using Tableau and public data. The project highlights regional disparities and progress toward global energy goals..

It also has a GitHub repo and more details shown in screenshots.
